title: turbine operation
description: Gas-phase turbine (expander). Given the shaft power (negative, work extracted) and isentropic efficiency, the discharge pressure, discharge temperature and expansion ratio follow from the energy balance.

W_shaft.title: Shaft power (extracted)
W_shaft.description: Mechanical power extracted from the gas (negative).

eta.title: Isentropic efficiency
eta.description: Isentropic efficiency w_real / w_isentropic (0 < eta <= 1). Lower eta captures less expansion work, leaving more heat in the exhaust.
